mapper.sql: id, created_time, updated_time, is_delete, setting_id, user_id, default_visibility_type, allow_friend_request, allow_search_by_phone, allow_search_by_email
mapper.select: select from user_settings where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select from user_settings where setting_id = #{settingId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1

select from user_settings
order by id desc

select from user_settings
order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into user_settings (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, setting_id, user_id, default_visibility_type, allow_friend_request, allow_search_by_phone, allow_search_by_email) values (#{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{isDelete}, #{settingId}, #{userId}, #{defaultVisibilityType}, #{allowFriendRequest}, #{allowSearchByPhone}, #{allowSearchByEmail})

insert into user_settings (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, setting_id, user_id, default_visibility_type, allow_friend_request, allow_search_by_phone, allow_search_by_email) values
(#{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.settingId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.defaultVisibilityType}, #{item.allowFriendRequest}, #{item.allowSearchByPhone}, #{item.allowSearchByEmail})
mapper.update: update user_settings set user_id = #{userId}, default_visibility_type = #{defaultVisibilityType}, allow_friend_request = #{allowFriendRequest}, allow_search_by_phone = #{allowSearchByPhone}, allow_search_by_email = #{allowSearchByEmail}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where id = #{id}

update user_settings set user_id = #{userId}, default_visibility_type = #{defaultVisibilityType}, allow_friend_request = #{allowFriendRequest}, allow_search_by_phone = #{allowSearchByPhone}, allow_search_by_email = #{allowSearchByEmail}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where setting_id = #{settingId}

update.foreach: update user_settings set user_id = #{item.userId}, default_visibility_type = #{item.defaultVisibilityType}, allow_friend_request = #{item.allowFriendRequest}, allow_search_by_phone = #{item.allowSearchByPhone}, allow_search_by_email = #{item.allowSearchByEmail}, updated_time = #{item.updatedTime}, is_delete = #{item.isDelete} where setting_id = #{item.settingId}
